name: Planked Salmon with Grilled Pineapple, Rhubarb and Habanero
recipeIngredient: 2 sides Wild Canadian salmon (5 pounds each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients and reserve.
2. In a bowl, combine the pineapple juice, rhubarb, crushed pineapple, and habanero pepper. Reserve this mixture for mopping the fish while cooking.
3. From the tail to the head, rub the dry rub on the salmon sides using long, slow strokes. Rub the salmon for 5 minutes.
4. Allow the salmon to sit in the refrigerator for 3 hours.
5. Rinse the salmon with cold water.
6. Lay the fillets, skin side down, on a soaked, oiled cedar plank. Place in a smoker set to 225°F using alderberry wood.
7. Smoke the salmon for 2 1/2 hours, coating it every 10 minutes with the basting liquid.
